src/test/java/edu/hm/hafner/util/Archite.general_idea: Remove import for deprecated ArchUnit class ConstructorCallTarget.
src/test/java/edu/hm/hafner/util/Archite.why_exists: The class com.tngtech.archunit.core.domain.AccessTarget.ConstructorCallTarget was removed or deprecated in newer ArchUnit versions, causing a compilation error if imported.

src/test/java/edu/hm/hafner/util/Archite.general_idea: Rename DescribedPredicate.apply to test to match Java 8+ Predicate interface.
src/test/java/edu/hm/hafner/util/Archite.why_exists: The DescribedPredicate class in newer ArchUnit versions implements java.util.Predicate, requiring the method to be named test instead of apply.

src/test/java/edu/hm/hafner/util/Archite.general_idea: Rename DescribedPredicate.apply to test in ExceptionHasNoContext.
src/test/java/edu/hm/hafner/util/Archite.why_exists: The DescribedPredicate class in newer ArchUnit versions implements java.util.Predicate, requiring the method to be named test instead of apply.

src/test/java/edu/hm/hafner/util/Archite.general_idea: Replace deprecated ConstructorCallTarget usage with var and isEmpty check.
src/test/java/edu/hm/hafner/util/Archite.why_exists: The class ConstructorCallTarget was removed or its API changed in newer ArchUnit versions, causing compilation errors if used directly.
